ab: ka nimakong a nimai jia?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: ko niomalam.
en: I came on foot.

ab: ikongo mo niavangan a aleleh?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: avavangan no tao a rako a aleleh.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: ka nimakong a nimangey do Kyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: na nyavang yaken ni ama,meyheza mangey.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: ya makongo a yamangey do peyvatvatkan da?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: ya na iyavang ni ama na do otobay.
ch: B:他爸爸用摩托車載去學校。
en: B: His father drove him to school on a motorcycle.

ab: yamakongo si akes mo a yamey manazang so iyakan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: ya meyotobay a yamey manazang so iyakan.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: makongo ka a mangey do pongso?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: mavang ko do avang a mangey do pongso.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: makongo ito a mangey do pongso?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: mavang do sikoki a mangey do pongso.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: makongo ito a mangey do Kawsyong?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: mavang do yamangonong do vahalang a aleleh a mangey do kawsyong.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: ya mavang do yamatolatolang a aleleh a mangey do Taitong?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: nonan, ya mavang do yamatolatolang a aleleh a mangey do Taitong
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: ya nimavang do yamatolatolang a aleleh a mangey do Taitong?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: beken, ni mavang do sikoki a mangey do Taitong.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: yamyan so masngen do jia pananalan so aleleh?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Jingyan, tokamangonong ta paka citan mo so pananalan so aleleh.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ya masngen do jia o minato?
en: A: Is the port very close to here?

ab: jiarai do jiya o minato a.
en: B: The port is far away from here.

ab: no yamavangan do avavangan no tao a rako a aleleh am, ya mowney a yamakaranes do peyvatvatkan nyo?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: yasa ka vatvatek a na ka pakaranes do peyvatvatkan namen.
ch: B:一個小時會到我們學校。
en: B: Come to our school one hour.

ab: no yamavangan do yamangonong do vahalang a aleleh a mangey do Taipey am, yapira ka vatvatek.
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺北?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taipei by THSR?

ab: yadowa ka vatvatek a na ka pakaranes do Taipey.
en: B: We will arrive Taipei in two hours.

ab: yamowney o mo peyaleleh a yamangey do Olay?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: ala yasa ka vatvatek.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: simlivon ka mai do vahey namen am mowney?
ch: A:你環島走路來我家要多久?
en: A: How long does it take for you to walk from the island to my house?

ab: atlo a kavatvatek.
en: B: It takes three hours.

ab: Ka mateneng do yavaziososen no ai a meyyaleleh?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Ko mateneng do yavaziososen no ai a meyyaleleh.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: yamyan so otobay mo?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yasa o otobay ko.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: ka mateneng a ya meyotobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yabo otobay ko.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
